changePassword.title: Change your password
changePassword.subtitle: You must set a new password before continuing.
changePassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters.
changePassword.complexity: Must include lower-case, upper-case, digit and symbol.

dashboard.homeBody: Use the side navigation to manage master data and staff accounts.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.subtitle: Update your contact details and notification preferences.
profile.mobileHelp: Optional. Digits only, up to 15 characters; may start with +.
profile.notificationsPushEnabledHelp: Receive complaint updates on this device.
profile.changePasswordBody: Rotate your password regularly to keep your account secure.

common.name: Name
common.codePattern: Use upper-case letters, digits and hyphens only.

subdivisions.heading: Subdivisions
subdivisions.subheading: Geographical units managed by the board.

distributionCenters.heading: Distribution centres
distributionCenters.subheading: Field offices grouped under a subdivision.
distributionCenters.scopedToYourSubdivision: Centre will be created under your subdivision.

categories.heading: Complaint categories
categories.slaRange: SLA must be between 1 and 720 hours.

adminStaff.heading: Staff
adminStaff.subheading: Create and manage staff accounts in your subdivision.

form.mobileHelp: Optional. Digits only, up to 15 chars.

tempPassword.title: Temporary password
tempPassword.intro: Share this password with {{name}} ({{employeeId}}) over a secure channel. They will be required to change it on first sign-in.
tempPassword.warning: This password will NOT be shown again. Copy it now.
tempPassword.label: Temporary password

resetConfirm.title: Reset password
resetConfirm.body: This will revoke all active sessions for {{name}} and generate a new one-time password. Continue?

deactivateConfirm.title: Deactivate staff member
deactivateConfirm.body: Deactivating {{name}} will revoke their sessions and block sign-in. You can re-activate later. Continue?

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.badCredentials: Employee ID or password is incorrect.
errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.passwordResetRequired: You must change your password before continuing.
errors.SUBDIVISION_HAS_ACTIVE_DCS: Cannot deactivate: this subdivision still has active distribution centres.
errors.SUBDIVISION_HAS_ACTIVE_STAFF: Cannot deactivate: this subdivision still has active staff accounts.
errors.DC_HAS_ACTIVE_STAFF: Cannot deactivate: this distribution centre still has active staff accounts.
errors.EMPLOYEE_ID_TAKEN: This employee ID is already in use.
errors.ADMIN_ALREADY_EXISTS_FOR_SUBDIV: An active admin already exists for this subdivision.
errors.ENGINEER_ALREADY_EXISTS_FOR_DC: An active engineer already exists for this distribution centre.
errors.STAFF_SCOPE_MISMATCH: Staff account is outside your subdivision.
errors.STAFF_ROLE_FIELDS_INVALID: The provided fields do not match the selected role.
errors.DC_NOT_IN_SUBDIVISION: The chosen distribution centre is not in your subdivision.
errors.CANNOT_DEACTIVATE_SELF: You cannot deactivate or reset your own account.
errors.DUPLICATE_KEY: A record with the same code already exists.
errors.OTP_COOLDOWN: Please wait a few seconds before requesting another OTP.
errors.OTP_RATE_LIMIT: You've requested too many OTPs for this number. Try again in an hour.
errors.OTP_INVALID: That OTP isn't right. Please try again.
errors.OTP_EXPIRED: Your verification expired. Please request a new OTP.
errors.OTP_TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS: Too many incorrect attempts. Request a new OTP to continue.
errors.CONSUMER_NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find this Consumer ID.
errors.CONSUMER_INACTIVE: This Consumer ID is inactive. Please contact your distribution centre.
errors.IMAGE_TOO_LARGE: This image is larger than 1 MB even after compression. Please try a different photo.
errors.IMAGE_INVALID_TYPE: Only JPEG and PNG images are supported.
errors.IMAGE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: You can attach a maximum of 3 images.
errors.IMAGE_UPLOAD_FAILED: One of the images failed to upload. Please try again.
errors.IMAGE_COMPRESSION_FAILED: Could not compress this image. Please try a different photo.
errors.CATEGORY_INACTIVE: This category is no longer accepting complaints. Pick another one.
errors.COMPLAINT_NOT_OWNED_BY_CONSUMER: This ticket doesn't belong to your verified mobile number.
errors.COMPLAINT_NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find a complaint with that ID.
errors.COMPLAINT_OUT_OF_SCOPE: This complaint is outside your assigned area.
errors.COMPLAINT_NOT_SUBMITTED: Only newly submitted complaints can take this action.
errors.COMPLAINT_TERMINAL: This complaint is closed — no further changes are allowed.
errors.INVALID_TECHNICIAN: Pick a technician active in this distribution centre.
errors.DUPLICATE_PARENT_NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find a complaint with that parent ticket number.
errors.SELF_REFERENCING_DUPLICATE: A complaint can't be marked as a duplicate of itself.

landing.title: Lodge a complaint
landing.subtitle: Enter your Consumer ID and mobile to start.

otp.title: Verify OTP
otp.intro: We sent a 6-digit code to {{mobile}}. It's valid for a few minutes.
otp.label: Enter OTP

submit.title: Tell us what's wrong
submit.descriptionHelp: Up to 4000 characters. Be specific — the engineer reads this first.
submit.descriptionTooLong: Please keep the description under 4000 characters.
submit.imagesHelp: Up to 3 photos, JPEG or PNG, max 1 MB each after auto-compression.
submit.restoredDraft: We restored your draft. Photos need to be re-picked.
submit.imageInvalidType: Skipped: only JPEG / PNG are accepted.
submit.imageTooLarge: Skipped: image is over 1 MB even after compression.
submit.imageLimitExceeded: You can attach at most 3 photos.

confirmation.title: Complaint registered
confirmation.notYoursBody: This ticket was registered under a different Consumer ID. Verify again to view your own complaints.

lookup.heading: Complaints
lookup.subheading: Open a complaint by ID. A searchable list lands in a later stage.
lookup.label: Complaint ID
lookup.outOfScopeBody: This complaint is in a different distribution centre or subdivision than yours.

detail.notFoundBody: We couldn't find a complaint with that ID. It may have been deleted.
detail.outOfScopeBody: This complaint is in a different distribution centre or subdivision than yours.

actions.heading: Actions
actions.noneTerminal: This complaint is closed — no further changes are allowed.

assign.title: Assign complaint
assign.noTechnicians: No active technicians in this distribution centre.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you requested does not exist.
